name: RFpeptides
description: Design macrocyclic peptides to a target structure. Designs against MCL1 and MDM2 demonstrate KD between 1-10 μM, and the best anti-GABARAP macrocycle binds with a KD of 6 nM and a sub-nanomolar IC50 in vitro.
capabilities: Design macrocyclic peptides to a target structure
Designs against MCL1 and MDM2 demonstrate KD between 1-10 μM, and the best anti-GABARAP macrocycle binds with a KD of 6 nM and a sub-nanomolar IC50 in vitro

pdbFile.description: Target protein structure in PDB format

hotspots.description: Hotspot residues on the target for peptide binding

peptideLength.description: Length or range for the macrocyclic peptide

numDesigns.description: Number of macrocyclic peptide designs to generate
